svg.text: Intelligent Healthcare Compliance & Safety Management System
Agile / Scrum Project Management Plan · 3 Sprints × 2 Weeks + 1 Release Week = 7 Weeks Total
Group W · Abu Sufian · Xiao Liang · MSE800 Week 9
Build a secure JWT authentication system and core user
management API with role-based access control (RBAC)
▸ As a staff, I can register and log in with JWT authentication
▸ As an admin, I can manage user roles and permissions
▸ As a staff, I can view and complete training modules
Velocity: 21 SP · Stories: 3/3 · Bugs fixed: 4 · PO Accepted: ✓
Build incident reporting and AI-powered RAG compliance
chatbot using fastembed + OpenRouter Llama 4 Scout
▸ As a staff, I can submit safety incident reports
▸ As an admin, I can review and resolve incident reports
▸ As a staff, I can query the AI compliance chatbot
Velocity: 24 SP · Stories: 3/3 · Bugs fixed: 3 · PO Accepted: ✓
Build real-time analytics dashboards; complete full QA
suite and verify all 10 business compliance metrics
▸ As an admin, I can view real-time compliance dashboards
▸ As a staff, I can track my training completion progress
▸ As an admin, I can generate compliance audit reports
Full dashboard + QA pass + production build
Velocity: 26 SP · Stories: 3/3 · Bugs fixed: 5 · PO Accepted: ✓
Deploy all 3 sprint increments to production;
monitor 48 h and complete stakeholder handoff
React to Vercel · Django to Render · PostgreSQL to Supabase
Auth · incidents · chatbot · dashboard all verified ✓
▸ Production URL — Vercel + Render + Supabase live
▸ Full test report — 10 business metrics verified
▸ Handoff docs — README + API docs + runbook
Total: 71 SP · Sprints: 3 · Duration: 7 weeks · Team: 2 devs
Dev Team — Abu Sufian & Xiao Liang (full-stack delivery)
DoD: Code reviewed · Unit tests pass · Integrated on staging · PO accepted · Documented
SP = Story Points · PO = Product Owner · DoD = Definition of Done
